description_long: This is a simple, modern chair with a geometric, boxy design and clean lines. The chair features a flat, rectangular seat and a tall, straight backrest that extends vertically from the rear edge of the seat. It is supported by four straight, square-section legs, each positioned at the corners for stability. The chair is entirely a uniform gray color, suggesting it is made from a single material, likely painted or powder-coated metal or wood. There are no armrests or decorative elements, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The overall construction appears sturdy and suitable for use in public or urban environments such as parks, bus stops, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A minimalist, boxy gray chair with a flat seat, tall backrest, and four straight legs, designed for sturdy urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat seat, tall backrest, and two front legs clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the straight backrest and the depth of the seat, with both front and rear legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width of the backrest and the two rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the seat depth and leg arrangement.
